title: Entity 51
wikitext:
{{Simple Image Block|image=Entity51.png|caption=Photograph of Entity 51, under a microscope.}}{{Cave Theme}}{{DISPLAYTITLE:Entity 51: "Venatores Salis"}} ==Description== Entity 51, also known as “Mineral Cravers,” is a single-genus prokaryote. Known as the species named “Venatores Salis," they are round-shaped and live collectively. The entity’s shells are durable and can withstand UV radiation and extreme temperatures. Entity 51 is thought to have evolved on [[Level 8]] over a long period of time, leading Entity 51 to its evolution and thus its ability to live off environmental features. The exact root of Entity 51 is unknown, but some theories suggest that it may be an example of abiogenesisAbiogenesis is the scientific theory of how living organisms first arose from non-living matter.. Entity 51’s proportions come in a wide range, greater than most bacteria before mitosis. A newly born Entity 51 cell comes in at 5 micrometers 1 μm (micrometer) is equal to 0.001 mm (millimeter). For example, a human eyelash is usually about 10 millimeters in size. in radius, nearly as large as an adult human blood cell. An adult Entity 51 cell is around 250 micrometers in radius, which is nearly as big as a grain of salt. Entity 51’s general habitat is on top of mineral crystals, and they can be seen as a layer of dust surrounding crystals. Thus, general habitats where they can be found are Levels with geological features or with an abundance of minerals. {{Simple Image Block|image=Cave8.png|caption=Photograph of a cave in [[Level 8]], infested with mineral crystals, within a week after Entity 51 populating the area.}} Entity 51 has a unique ability to convert minerals into an energy source, using it to provide coherent metabolism and reproduce, similar to chemolithoautotrophs. In principle, oxidizing minerals and providing consistent ATPAdenosine Triphosphate (ATP) is the primary energy currency of the cell. is not uncommon in nature, but Entity 51’s ability to directly latch and consume minerals even without oxygen is distinctive, as Entity 51 can regulate the surrounding atmosphere and can tear apart various kinds of chemicals to continue oxidation, allowing it to stay alive under extreme conditions. Entity 51 undergoes fossilization under stress, often due to external force or overpopulation. The process is irreversible and occurs within a few minutes for the aforesaid reasons. The process begins as the stressed cells release stored autoinducers onto upper-layer cells, causing the top layer to compress the cytoplasm and build a mineral layer, protecting the younger cells in the bottom layer. This leads to an abundance of mineral crystals within environments, often causing entire regions to be infested with crystals. ==Spreadation== Even though Entity 51 isn’t infectious, it’s observed to use hosts to transmit from place to place, which includes humans as temporary hosts for transmission. The human immune system is powerful enough to detect and destroy Venatores Salis with ease, tho entity can often survive for as long as a few weeks until the immune system detects the cells. Affected individuals might experience: *Stronger Dehydration *Mild Hypernatremia *Increased Appetite *Mouth Dryness *Coughing Entity 51 lacks the ability to infect other cells; thus, these symptoms are caused by the immune system's response and Venatores Salis’s metabolism. Entity 51 proceeds to a pseudo-incubation state, hiding in the lungs after inhaling dust containing Venatores Salis; the entity slows metabolism, attaches to cells, and is released through coughing. Recommended preparations are to ensure a proper distance from crystals and not inhale close surfaces. It’s vital to hydrate[[Almond Water]] is highly effective in the recovery period. frequently and exercise whilst the symptoms range. ==General Impacts== To this day, there have been many kinds of discussions about Entity 51; most can be categorised into these three branches: ===Discovery=== Discovery of Entity 51 is still debated on various sides, but the most consistent thesis is that Entity 51 was discovered long before the Industrial Revolution, with many sources referring to it as “Alive Crystals,” due to increasing counts of mineral crystals in [[Level 8]], seemingly out of nowhere. In the last century, [[M.E.G.]] released a document about the structures of these “Alive Crystals,” revealing the true nature and the existence of Venatores Salis. ===Cultural=== {{Simple Image Block|image=8cave.png|caption=Sculpture made out of crystals, formed by Venatores Salis fossils.}} Entity 51 began to gain fame in the early 2000s; it grew as a cultural reference to nationalism and evolved into a meme in various backnet forums. In the current era, Entity 51 is used for many types of craftworks and activities, including trading, farming, and sculpture. Many trade groups sell petri dishes with Venatores Salis at affordable prices and determined safe for personal use. ===Research=== Entity 51 is utilized widely throughout the Backrooms for research cases; many groups endeavor to comprehend Venatores Salis’s true nature and replicate the ability to grow minerals, in the case of growing nutritional sources. Current reports indicate that [[M.E.G.]] stores about 7 thousand petri dishes of Venatores Salis for resuming research, tho there aren’t any documents or announcements that have been published yet.
